goal: UR10 builtin pick-place mirroring the standalone ur10_pick_up.py geometry as closely as possible — cube at +X +Y on a pedestal (matches standalone home pose's natural reach direction). If THIS doesn't deliver, the controller stack is the issue, not geometry. Diagnostic complement to CP-78.
thoughts:
CP-79 mirrors the geometry of standalone ur10_pick_up.py:
1) Cube at world (+0.6, +0.4, 0.975) on a pedestal — +X +Y direction matches the natural reach of the standalone home pose [-π/2, -π/2, -π/2, -π/2, π/2, 0] which puts EE at relative (+1.05, -0.74, +0.21).
2) Bin at (+0.6, -0.4, 0.75) — same +X side, just the other +/-Y direction.
3) UR10 base at (0, 0, 0.75) — table-mounted, same as CP-78. Standalone has base at (0,0,0); we shift to (0,0,0.75) since our scene has a 0.75m table.
4) Builtin handler uses the mirror home pose [π/2, -π/2, π/2, -π/2, -π/2, 0] by default. THAT'S WRONG for this scene — but the test is whether the controller stack itself can deliver if geometry+home are aligned.
5) Expected outcome: with cube on +X side + standalone home pointing +X, RmpFlow's IK has the natural reach. Suction should engage if the controller stack works.
6) If function-gate fails here too, the suction stack itself (not just home/geometry) has a deeper issue — likely the URDF ee_suction_link vs USD suction_cup frame mismatch is the bug, not configurable.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/UR10", prim_type="Xform")
add_reference(prim_path="/World/UR10", reference_path="/mnt/shared_data/isaac-sim-assets-complete-5.0.0/Assets/Isaac/5.0/Collected_Robots/ur10.usd")
teleport_prim(prim_path="/World/UR10", position=[0, 0, 0.75])

# Pedestal at +X +Y (natural standalone-home reach direction)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Pedestal", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.6, 0.4, 0.875], scale=[0.06, 0.06, 0.075])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Pedestal", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# Cube on pedestal
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.6, 0.4, 0.975], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=["/World/Cube_1"], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", material_name="rubber")

# Bin at +X -Y
create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[0.6, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.3, 0.3, 0.15])

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    robot_family="ur10",
    target_source="builtin",
    source_paths=["/World/Cube_1"],
    destination_path="/World/Bin",
    end_effector_offset=[0.0, 0.0, 0.02],
)
code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path={{primary_robot.path}}, prim_type="Xform")
add_reference(prim_path={{primary_robot.path}}, reference_path="/mnt/shared_data/isaac-sim-assets-complete-5.0.0/Assets/Isaac/5.0/Collected_Robots/ur10.usd")
teleport_prim(prim_path={{primary_robot.path}}, position={{primary_robot.position}})

# Pedestal at +X +Y (natural standalone-home reach direction)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Pedestal", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.6, 0.4, 0.875], scale=[0.06, 0.06, 0.075])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Pedestal", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# Cube on pedestal
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, material_name="rubber")

# Bin at +X -Y
create_bin(prim_path={{primary_destination.path}}, position={{primary_destination.position}}, size={{primary_destination.size}})

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    robot_family="ur10",
    target_source="builtin",
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}],
    destination_path={{primary_destination.path}},
    end_effector_offset=[0.0, 0.0, 0.02],
)
extension_notes: CP-79 mirrors CP-78 with cube at +X +Y instead of -X +Y, isolating geometry-vs-home-pose alignment. Builtin handler's mirror home pose [π/2, ...] points EE toward -X +Y, so this scene would need the ORIGINAL standalone home [-π/2, ...] for natural alignment. Diagnostic only — actual code change to flip home per-canonical is Sprint 4+.
failure_modes: Same RmpFlow descent gap if the issue is the URDF ee_suction_link vs USD suction_cup frame mismatch (independent of home pose).
If function-gate fails here too, then the stack itself can't deliver from any geometry — strongly suggests the suction_cup never enters maxGripDistance regardless of pose.
Same UR10 init quirks as CP-75/CP-78.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-05-08; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (UR10 +X+Y pedestal — confirms raycast workaround works regardless of approach direction)
